publication.scope: Every parsed entry from the reviewed basketball-slang NVH lexical database.
publication.access: Static JSON chunks preserve source details, senses, definitions, examples, variants, user groups, and compilers without inventing a frequency ranking.

provenance.citation: Lithuanian Basketball Slang Lexical Database. 2026. CLARIN-LT Repository. https://hdl.handle.net/20.500.11821/81.

constraints: Do not present entries as corpus-frequency observations or rank them by popularity.
Preserve source, definition, example, variant, user-group, and compiler information where supplied.
Report 223 parsed top-level entries from the stored NVH file and preserve the source-record page's separate 233-entry claim.

views.title: Lithuanian basketball slang entries
views.description: Every parsed source entry in source order, with nested lexical evidence and the record-page count discrepancy kept in derivation metadata.
